global.description: The ad features a vibrant layout promoting a mobile game with engaging visuals and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to download the game with enticing rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: StormByte logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized logo with the text 'StormByte' prominently displayed in a dark color against a light background.

elements.label: Game icons
elements.description: Four circular game icons arranged in a grid, each with a light background and a darker circle in the center.

elements.label: Gameplay screenshot
elements.description: A rectangular area showing a gameplay screenshot with colorful graphics and interactive elements.

elements.label: Gameplay elements
elements.description: An area depicting various gameplay elements, including characters and obstacles in a vibrant setting.

elements.label: Top decorative shape
elements.description: A triangular decorative shape at the top of the ad, adding visual interest with a contrasting color.

elements.label: Next arrow
elements.description: A right-facing arrow icon indicating progression or navigation, designed in a simple and clean style.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular decorative element positioned near the top, adding subtle detail to the design.

elements.label: Small gameplay element
elements.description: A small gameplay-related element positioned in the center, contributing to the overall interactive theme.

elements.label: Small gameplay icon
elements.description: A small icon related to gameplay, positioned in the center, enhancing the visual narrative.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular decorative element positioned near the top, adding subtle detail to the design.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A large, bold headline stating 'StormByte' that captures attention with its prominent placement.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: A clear and inviting body text that reads 'Win epic rewards No ads in first week', designed to attract users.
elements.text_content: Win epic rewards No ads in first week

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent 'Order now' button styled to stand out, encouraging immediate user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, playable, bright and playful, StormByte logo, gameplay elements, promotional text.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by gameplay elements in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: StormByte, Win epic rewards No ads in first week, Order now
